title: Design System: ZamZam Auto Parts — Web Inventory

headline.purpose: Modal and page titles only — the largest text in the app, capped at 18px.

title.purpose: Card titles and detail-view section headings.

body.purpose: Running text, inputs, base document size.

label.purpose: Badges, meta rows, filter chips, vehicle-line eyebrows.

shadows.name: sm
shadows.purpose: Barely-there separation for small floating controls (card 3-dot menu trigger).

shadows.name: md
shadows.purpose: Hover-lifted cards, open menus/dropdowns, and the floating tab island (permanent on the island).

motion.name: ease-out
motion.purpose: Press-feedback scale-downs on buttons, chips, tabs, and cards.

motion.name: ease-card-hover
motion.value: transform 150ms ease, box-shadow 150ms ease, border-color 150ms ease
motion.purpose: Card lift on hover/focus (hover/color change -> plain ease per Emil Kowalski's framework).

motion.name: ease-tab
motion.value: background 180ms var(--ease-out), color 180ms var(--ease-out), transform 160ms var(--ease-out)
motion.purpose: Segmented-control tab and nav-link state changes.

breakpoints.name: grid-2up
breakpoints.purpose: Below this, card grids stay 2-per-row; above it, auto-fill takes over.

breakpoints.name: modal-dialog
breakpoints.purpose: Below this, detail modals are bottom sheets; above it, centered dialogs.

components.name: Primary Button
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #0c7770; color: #fff; padding: 11px 16px; border: none; border-radius: 8px; font-weight: 600; font-size: 14px; transition: background 150ms ease, transform 160ms cubic-bezier(0.23,1,0.32,1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #095a54; } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: scale(0.97); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #0c7770; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Navbar (Panel Chrome)
components.description: Sticky top navbar on a fixed charcoal panel, independent of OS light/dark theme, with an active nav-link tint.
components.css: .ds-navbar { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 16px; padding: 14px 20px; background: rgba(28,33,40,0.92); backdrop-filter: blur(10px); border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08); } .ds-logo-chip { background: #fff; border-radius: 8px; padding: 4px 8px; font-weight: 700; font-size: 11px; } .ds-nav-link { padding: 8px 14px; border-radius: 999px; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 600; color: #9aa0a8; text-decoration: none; transition: background 150ms ease, color 150ms ease; } .ds-nav-link:hover { background: #262c35; color: #f4f5f6; } .ds-nav-link-active { background: rgba(45,212,201,0.14); color: #2dd4c9; }

components.name: Destructive Button
components.description: Delete action inside detail modals and confirm dialogs.
components.html: <button class="ds-btn-danger"><svg width="14" height="14" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path d="M3 6h18M8 6V4a2 2 0 0 1 2-2h4a2 2 0 0 1 2 2v2m3 0-1 14a2 2 0 0 1-2 2H7a2 2 0 0 1-2-2L4 6"/></svg> Delete</button>
components.css: .ds-btn-danger { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; background: rgba(220,38,38,0.1); color: #dc2626; border: 1px solid #dc2626; padding: 7px 12px; border-radius: 8px; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600; }

components.name: Part Card
components.description: Compact inventory item card with thumbnail, status badge, and meta row — stays on light paper even though the chrome around it is dark.
components.html:
Maruti Suzuki · K12

Front Right Headlamp

#OEM-4471
components.css: .ds-card { display: flex; flex-direction: column; background: #fff; border: 1px solid #e3e3e8; border-radius: 14px; overflow: hidden; transition: transform 150ms ease, box-shadow 150ms ease, border-color 150ms ease; } .ds-card:hover { transform: translateY(-2px); box-shadow: 0 6px 16px -4px rgba(15,15,20,0.12), 0 2px 6px -2px rgba(15,15,20,0.08); border-color: rgba(12,119,112,0.35); } .ds-card:active { transform: translateY(-2px) scale(0.985); } .ds-card-thumb { aspect-ratio: 4/3; background: #f0f0f3; } .ds-card-body { padding: 12px 14px 14px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 6px; } .ds-card-eyebrow { font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600; color: #0c7770; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.02em; margin: 0; } .ds-card-title { font-size: 14px; font-weight: 600; margin: 0; } .ds-card-meta { font-size: 12px; color: #66666f; }

components.name: Status Badge
components.description: Pill status/condition tag used on cards and detail views.
components.css: .ds-badge { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 4px; padding: 3px 9px; border-radius: 999px; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.01em; } .ds-badge-success { color: #16a34a; background: rgba(22,163,74,0.1); }

components.name: Search Input
components.description: Search bar with leading icon, used above every card grid.
components.css: .ds-search { position: relative; display: flex; align-items: center; } .ds-search-icon { position: absolute; left: 13px; color: #93939c; } .ds-search-input { width: 100%; padding: 10px 34px 10px 36px; border: 1px solid #e3e3e8; border-radius: 14px; background: #fff; font-size: 14px; } .ds-search-input:focus { outline: none; border-color: rgba(12,119,112,0.35); box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(12,119,112,0.1); }

components.name: Segmented Tabs (Panel Chrome)
components.description: Floating Cars/Parts pill switch on the Inventory page — charcoal panel like the navbar, not a light card.
components.css: .ds-tabs { display: inline-flex; gap: 2px; padding: 4px; background: #1c2128; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08); border-radius: 999px; box-shadow: 0 6px 16px -4px rgba(15,15,20,0.12), 0 2px 6px -2px rgba(15,15,20,0.08); } .ds-tab { padding: 9px 20px; border: none; border-radius: 999px; background: transparent; color: #9aa0a8; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 600; transition: background 180ms cubic-bezier(0.23,1,0.32,1), color 180ms cubic-bezier(0.23,1,0.32,1); } .ds-tab:active { transform: scale(0.96); } .ds-tab-active { background: #0c7770; color: #fff; }

narrative.overview: This is the tool a yard clerk trusts to be right, not the tool that tries to impress them. Every screen reads like a well-kept ledger for a working scrapyard: precise records of parts and donor vehicles, dense but never cluttered. The navbar and floating Cars/Parts tab island are a fixed charcoal 'control deck', always dark regardless of OS theme; every content surface (cards, modals) stays light for legibility of dense text and part photos. Personality is clean, modern, and trustworthy — restraint and clarity carry the design, not decoration. The system explicitly rejects the generic SaaS-dashboard look.
keyCharacteristics: The navbar and floating tab island are a fixed charcoal panel, always dark, like a tool's control deck — independent of OS light/dark preference.
All content surfaces (cards, modals, inputs) stay light/paper; only the chrome goes dark.
One teal accent color, used sparingly, plus a brighter cyan tint reserved for accent text on the dark chrome (contrast requires it).
Dense information laid out with generous internal padding, not visual noise.
Identical component vocabulary whether the screen is used one-handed on a phone at the yard or with a mouse at a desk.

rules.name: The One Accent Rule
rules.body: Ledger Teal (or its accent-on-panel tint, on chrome only) is the only color used to mean 'interactive' or 'primary.' It never appears as pure decoration.

rules.name: The Fixed Chrome Rule
rules.body: Panel Charcoal marks 'this is the control deck' (navbar, tab switcher) regardless of OS theme. Content surfaces never get it.

rules.name: The No-Display-Size Rule
rules.body: Nothing in this system exceeds 18px. Hierarchy comes from weight and color, not scale jumps.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: A card, input, or panel with no active interaction has no shadow — only a 1px hairline border. The two chrome surfaces are the named exception.

dos: Do use Ledger Teal (#0c7770 / dark-content #14847a) as the only accent on content surfaces.
Do use accent-on-panel (#2dd4c9), not the base teal, for accent text on Panel Charcoal.
Do keep Panel Charcoal scoped to the navbar and floating tab island only.
Do keep cards and inputs flat (border only) at rest; add shadow-md only on hover/open/active states.
Do give every pressable control a subtle :active scale-down, gated behind prefers-reduced-motion.
Do pair every signal color (danger/success/warning/info) with its one fixed meaning.
donts: Don't reintroduce a generic SaaS-dashboard look: no purple/blue gradient hero cards, no stock-icon card grids.
Don't extend Panel Charcoal beyond the navbar and tab island.
Don't use the base Ledger Teal as text color on Panel Charcoal — use accent-on-panel instead.
Don't add a colored border-left/border-right stripe as a decorative accent on any card or list row.
Don't use background-clip: text gradient headings.
Don't let a card or button carry both a soft wide drop shadow and a full 1px border as static decoration.
Don't use border-radius above 20px on cards, panels, or inputs.
Don't repurpose Danger red, Success green, Warning amber, or Info blue as a general accent color.
